title: Montrol City
content:
{{Top|leg}}
[[File:Montrol_City.jpg|250px|right]]
'''Montrol City''' was the capital of [[Gandle Ott]].

==Characteristics==
Located on the edge of the [[Sanche Ocean]], Montrol City was a modern city with many cultural points of interest. Art museums were located downtown, and the city boasted industrial harbors and tourist areas. It was also the location of [[The Bank]], the city courts, and the city computer center. Many of the planet's officials had residences in the city, and groves of [[cattarash mushroom]]s were cultivated all over.

==History==
During the early years of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], the city's mayor was [[Stanfeld Duffit]]. In [[8 ABY/Legends|8 ABY]], New Republic representatives from the [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] ''[[FarStar]]'' enjoyed the hospitality of the city when they stopped at Gandle Ott for several days while pursuing [[Moff/Legends|Moff]] [[Kentor Sarne]].
